resource.object: No recording because of time limit

resource.object: Invalid unit type, must be pack

resource.object: Invalid pack size, may be empty

resource.name: D
resource.object: The calculated price was too high

resource.name: E
resource.object: The pack was not in multi band

resource.name: PrunitClient
resource.object: Error constructing a process unit client

resource.name: NotInWeighMode
resource.object: The WPL is not running or pause

resource.name: QuantityIsZero
resource.object: The requested amount is zero, nothing done

resource.name: OrderIsNotForQuantity
resource.object: The ordered amount should be in quantity

resource.name: ComformatNotFound
resource.object: The comfomat could not be found

resource.name: WPL paused due to unexpected comformat started

resource.name: NoObject
resource.object: There is no object on which to operate

resource.name: FileDownloadError
resource.object: Error sending a file to the machine manager

resource.name: SystemBusy
resource.object: The WPL was busy, try again

resource.name: BackendException
resource.object: There was a undefined backend exception

resource.name: ComformatDifferentType
resource.object: The comformat in the multi should be either Single or Group, but not a mixture.

resource.name: TL8ProgramNotFound
resource.object: TL-8 program not found or defined.

resource.name: PackSizeNotUnit
resource.object: PackSize was not unit when sending it to totaliser.

resource.name: BackendExceptionNoMessage
resource.object: There was a backend exception, don't show it to the user.

resource.name: TLxRunning
resource.object: The Totaliser is running, should be stopped.

resource.name: PackSizeNotKilograms
resource.object: PackSize was not in kg, when sending it to totaliser.

resource.object: Bitmap is not black and white.

resource.name: StopCause232
resource.object: Timed out waiting for printer (similar to 281).

resource.name: StopCause288
resource.object: Run out of room in the filing system.

resource.name: StopCause584
resource.object: No variable data (a fault communicating with the labeller).

resource.name: StopCause633
resource.object: Internal error- contact Portals complaints department

resource.name: StopCause644
resource.object: Label not ready to be printed

resource.name: StopCause660
resource.object: too many packs between weigh cell and pcotf

resource.name: StopCause661
resource.object: pcotf failed to find pack end

resource.name: StopCause680
resource.object: label took too long to print

resource.name: StopCause681
resource.object: label took too long to print

resource.name: StopCause688
resource.object: no font module on the compact flash card

resource.name: StopCause793
resource.object: stop as a serial comms channel has died

resource.name: StopCause794
resource.object: No more unsoliceted or repeats until incoming message received.

resource.object: No recording because of time limit

Date or text is too long.
Target command not AMCP or N.
Label edge not L or T.
Can’t do this to a group.
An illegal attempt to update a slave Comformat has been made.
Trying to set a Next target when there is not one currently running, or trying to set a next target when one has already been specified.
Comformat names must start with a letter.
Attempt to mount too many volumes.
Attempt to mount volume not initialised by pHILE
Requested operation not allowed on specified file.
Too many files open for process.
Too many files open in system.

resource.object: Total mismatch for material: {2}\n customer: {1}, order: {0}

resource.name: LineHasToBeStopped
resource.object: The line has to be stopped, and the totalizer lanes should be empty, before downloading a new program

resource.name: NoLanesHasBeenAssigned
resource.object: There has to be lanes assigned before downloading a new program

resource.name: TotaliserMismatch
resource.object: Total mismatch for material: {2}\n customer: {1}, order: {0}

resource.name: LineHasToBeStopped
resource.object: The line has to be stopped, and the totalizer lanes should be empty, before downloading a new program

resource.object: The line has to be stopped, and the totalizer lanes should be empty, before downloading a new program

resource.name: TotaliserMismatch
resource.object: Total mismatch for material: {2}\n customer: {1}, order: {0}

resource.name: NewSchedulePartialCreatedMedia
resource.object: New schedule partial created, due to not mounted media

resource.name: NewSchedulePartialCreatedPackSize
resource.object: New schedule partial created, due to different pack sizes

resource.name: TooManyBands
resource.object: New schedule partial created, due to too many bands

resource.name: LineHasToBeStopped
resource.object: The line has to be stopped, and the totalizer lanes should be empty, before downloading a new program

resource.name: TotaliserMismatch
resource.object: Total mismatch for material: {2}\n customer: {1}, order: {0}

resource.name: NewSchedulePartialCreatedMedia
resource.object: New schedule partial created, due to not mounted media

resource.name: NewSchedulePartialCreatedPackSize

resource.name: TooManyBands

resource.name: BY_WEIGHT_AND_CHANNEL_MIXED_TARE
resource.object: By weight and channel mixed tare

resource.name: checkPackOnStation.ToolTip
resource.object: Create items registrations after the pack is created

resource.name: PrgActivity.Confirm
resource.object: Do you want to change activity and set the new active program to:

resource.name: PrgActivity.NotAllowed
resource.object: You are not allowed to change activity!

resource.name: ProdActivity.Confirm
resource.object: Do you want change active product to:

resource.name: PoActivity.Confirm
resource.object: Do you want to change purchase order to:

resource.name: ProdDateActivity.Confirm
resource.object: Do you want to change production date:

resource.name: WplSingleProductLabellingDescription
resource.object: This solution is the general solution for labelling individual items. Various product selection methods are supported. The weighing method can be catch-, fixed- or e-weighing.

resource.name: WplMultiProductLabellingDescription
resource.object: This solution is for random product items coming in to the WPL. The weighing method can be catch-, fixed- or e-weighing.

resource.name: WplSingleProductBoxingDescription
resource.object: This solution is for product items coming in to the WPL in batches (one product per batch) and being sorted on a TL-8/9 packing line into boxes. Items are accumulated into boxes by count.

resource.name: WplMultiProductBoxingDescription
resource.object: This solution is for random product items coming in to the WPL and being sorted on a TL-8/9 packing line into boxes. Items are accumulated into boxes by weight or count.

resource.name: WplBoxLabellingDescription
resource.object: Dynamic weighing and labelling of boxes. The weighing method can be catch-, fixed- or e-weighing.

resource.name: OcmBoxLabellingDescription
resource.object: This solution is for OCM 9500, equipped with a MAC4 controlled infeed, or two scanners. The boxes has to be pre-labelled with a barcode containg either a SSCC number or a product code.

resource.name: Wpl9010Description
resource.object: This solution is for the WPL 9010 manual weigh price labeller.

resource.name: WplSupervisorDescription
resource.object: This solution is for labelling individual items, the item is selected using a barcode scanner, or on the running screen of the WPL, as there is no Innova GUI. Orders/targets and TL-8/9 is not supported.
